BSCI378H

Cell Biology and Molecular Genetics Department Honors Seminar

BSCI398H

Biology Department Honors Seminar

Enrichment

Minimum 3 credits from any 300-level or 400-level BSCI, CHEM, or BCHM course.

1 BSCI223/283 is a pre-requisite for these upper level courses. 2 Credit will be given for either BSCI223 OR BSCI283. Credit cannot be granted for both courses. BSCI223/283 may count in the CEBG Area credits but NOT as an upper level lab.

3 Formerly BSCI474, cross-listed as HLSC374. Credit will be given for
